title: PlanRevisionRequest
description: Structured human-in-the-loop revision request for PlanAnalyze or NovelSystemSpec.

scope.description: Top-level or dotted fields the revision may change (e.g. events, links).

frozen_paths.description: Paths that must remain unchanged after refine.

constraint_ledger.description: Append-only constraints accumulated across HIL rounds.

source_excerpt.description: Optional short quote from source document supporting the revision.

expect_contains.description: Strings that must appear in the refined artifact (accept gate).
